title: Pixel Blocks
description: Pokemon Lucky Block! When mining the pixel block a random pokemon spawns.
body:
# **Pixel Blocks**

Ever wanted to play Pokémon with a lucky block twist? Now you can with Pixel Blocks! Break the Pixel Block and a random Pokémon will spawn—anything from common Pokémon to legendaries and mythicals! Add some excitement and surprise to your adventure. Have fun and see which Pokémon you get!


## How you can craft the Pixel Block:

![How to craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6886ec350fa829073ba811ce6231d6e38bb62be.png)
